name: autonomy-the-quest-to-build-the-driverless-car
description: Lawrence D. Burns and Christopher Shulgan's 'Autonomy: The Quest to Build the Driverless Car' — the inside story of the race to build self-driving cars, from the DARPA Grand Challenge to Google's Waymo, and how autonomous vehicles will reshape transportation and society.
useCase: Understand the history, technology, and future of autonomous vehicles from an industry insider who helped shape the field.
knownRisks: Written in 2018 — some information on industry developments is dated
Burns's insider perspective may be biased toward companies he was involved with
The technology landscape changes rapidly — supplement with current news
